summary: Frontend Dashboard appears updated to include an anniversary type filter (All/Baptism/Marriage/Funeral) and to pass an optional type filter through to both paginated anniversaries and PDF export queries. The diff summary does not provide visible evidence that the backend anniversary-number math was unified or that backend endpoints were extended to support server-side type filtering (before pagination and in PDF export).

missing_requirements.requirement: Unify anniversary-year math in the backend so anniversaryNumber is computed as (targetYear - eventYear) with no +1 offset; do not return anniversaries where anniversaryNumber is 0; source anniversaries strictly from baptismYear/marriageYear/funeralYear.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff excerpt is truncated and does not show any anniversary calculation logic changes. There is no explicit evidence in the provided diff summary that the anniversaryNumber computation was updated to remove a +1 offset or that anniversaryNumber==0 entries are excluded.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add backend support for filtering anniversaries by type for both paginated and PDF-export endpoints; filtering must apply before pagination and affect totalCount/pageCount and PDF contents.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend changes suggest a type filter parameter is being passed, but the backend/main.mo diff excerpt does not show any updated anniversaries endpoints or logic implementing server-side filtering before pagination or in PDF export.
